name: gamifiedlearning
description: Gamified Learning Matrix — mobile-first educational gaming platform

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && rsync -av --exclude 'dist' --exclude '.git' --exclude '.github' --exclude 'node_modules' --exclude 'package.json' --exclude 'package-lock.json' --exclude 'jest.config.cjs' --exclude '.eslintrc.json' --exclude '__tests__/' --exclude '**/__tests__/' --exclude 'netlify.toml' ./ dist/
